overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a detailed New York City neighborhood at night. The clip transitions from busy sidewalks past commercial storefronts, through an intersection with the Manhattan Bridge visible in the distance, and finally into a narrow back alley with debris.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking toward camera

entered.detail: vibrant blue commercial building with large windows and signage
illuminated business sign hanging over the street
trees with yellow-orange fall foliage along the sidewalk
tall multi-story brick residential building with fire escapes

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a busy city sidewalk at night, passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts. A blue commercial building dominates the left side while autumn trees line the right, with a distant sign for 'Zach's' visible ahead.

events.description: Spider-Man stops walking at the intersection edge
character looks upward and around at surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: pauses at the intersection to observe surroundings, looking up at the tall buildings

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat standing at corner looking at phone

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with white painted lines
traffic light showing red with yellow housing
large suspension bridge visible in the background between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection where Spider-Man stops to look around. The Manhattan Bridge is visible in the distance, and traffic signals glow red while pedestrians wait at the corners.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and kiosks

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past on the left side of the street
character turns slightly toward the alley entrance while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: crosses the street and continues walking past various storefronts and a red kiosk structure

notable_agents.action: man gesturing with arm extended as if hailing a taxi
yellow taxi cab driving down the street

entered.detail: storefront with red BBQ signage and yellow facade
bright red Asian-inspired kiosk structure with tiered roof
coffee shop with illuminated interior and outdoor seating

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along the street passing a BBQ restaurant and a distinctive red pagoda-style kiosk. A yellow taxi drives by as the character approaches a coffee shop and the entrance to a narrow alley.

events.description: enters narrow alleyway from the main commercial street
lighting becomes darker and more enclosed as moving deeper into the alley

agents.ego_description: walks past the coffee shop and enters a narrow alleyway with green bollards

entered.detail: narrow passage between brick buildings with green bollards
short green posts marking the alley entrance
large blue industrial dumpsters against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open street into a narrow alley entrance marked by green bollards. The coffee shop recedes behind as the alley narrows, with dumpsters visible along the brick walls and lighting becoming more shadowed.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service alley with debris and loading docks

agents.ego_description: walks through the narrow back alley with construction debris and loading dock areas

notable_agents.action: group of people standing near the illuminated alley exit in the distance

entered.detail: scattered wooden pallets, cardboard boxes, and trash bags
industrial metal shutters for building service entrances
broken down cardboard boxes and packing materials

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks deeper into the narrow service alley, surrounded by brick walls, metal roll-up doors, and scattered construction debris. The alley is dimly lit with a few figures visible near the distant exit where light streams in.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant New York City neighborhood at night that gradually narrows into a secluded, shadowed alleyway. It begins on a busy sidewalk passing illuminated storefronts and autumn trees, moving forward until the view opens into a wide intersection where the Manhattan Bridge looms in the distance under glowing red traffic signals. As the camera continues along the street, it passes a BBQ restaurant and a red pagoda-style kiosk while a yellow taxi drives by, eventually approaching a coffee shop. The scene then shifts from the open road into a narrow alley entrance marked by green bollards, causing the city lights to recede as the space tightens between brick walls. Finally, the camera follows deeper into the dimly lit service corridor, passing metal roll-up doors and scattered construction debris toward a distant, light-filled exit.
